description: Use this API to change the value of a character ICON (i.e., an element of the CHRICN array) of the “other” type model attached to a specified 2-terminal dc line. The corresponding integer ICON is set to 0. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_cct2dcomod_chricn(dc, model, j, chdata)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line for which model data is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change (j is relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model, e,g., 1 for first icon(m), 2 for icon(m+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: no CCT table entry for the model.
model names do not match - model is aaa not xxx.
no ICONs used in the model.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
